name: Sooz's Not So Alarming Chili
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute the onions in olive oil until translucent.
2. Add chili meat and cook, stirring occasionally, until lightly browned.
3. Drain excess fat from the meat mixture.
4. Stir in stewed tomatoes, green chili peppers, tomato sauce, ketchup, chili powder, salt, and pepper.
5. Simmer the chili uncovered for 30 minutes.
6. Partially drain the kidney beans and stir into the chili.
7. Continue simmering for an additional 15 minutes.
8. Serve with cornbread.
